textByHashes.018bd6e6d96ffbc4d50ab3cbcf783f5371c4e643: There is an open wound that bleeds only darkness.
textByHashes.066fe48091f519d42e24e77179803fd5f6820ae6: There is a bard who sings of your final moments.
textByHashes.5b7221273b38e1cc56209dbfb6693e80bce560a4: There is an avalanche of horrors which has discovered your name.
textByHashes.91ec55af6f2b06e1c48f2127ba1ddea523faa39f: There is a stranger who wears a black mask under their skin.
textByHashes.36636a3e70459989a105109859d538b6e6d8e27c: There is a city of blackstone where the screams are ever silent.
textByHashes.36b55efbdd36de3d5a5a07df38af90061bc6f3a5: There is a monument built in honour of the suffering you desire.
textByHashes.eeb22336c264ec54c7dd52485db7971a18643833: There is a choir of souls who you will one day meet.
textByHashes.746eba2c3a2a47e34f6753c8602f312ca1116625: There is a song so loud that you only hear silence.
textByHashes.f4bb678c998b6898396a6acb3d12a528c8ad7315: There is a library of sorrow where your final fate is written.
textByHashes.f498fd23d606b3fab4e0b72eedc97ca7bd3df7a7: There is a reaper who has a thousand gibbering faces.
textByHashes.9f340761059cef43b353ef6401affd617e40520f: There is an atrocity written upon blackstone.
textByHashes.9f263033252f6098b92c69e1751c8e51b58cd134: There is a king who presides over a court of corpses.
textByHashes.a4132de42b69be692733176ea06f85e74eb842f6: There is an ocean of souls where you are one day fated to swim.
textByHashes.9b939ed00ce29409f49b888bf21aad429c92c145: There is a judge who has already passed your sentence.
textByHashes.ec8bf2a4c3e824e72c5f045b324c67aa9fd3382c: There is a truth written upon the blackstone, and you cannot escape it.
textByHashes.9eac3062c55dd519d32f91ed6dc73485b6317d42: Come, . The Silent Choir awaits you. It is time for your eternal song.
textByHashes.85fb8682d45e0e7b19eca8aa43b6f148bf52275b: You cannot escape your fate, . The endless sea calls for you.
textByHashes.d579234a757a88f3d783ba10e6f91617f3365b56: Do you really think you can hide, ?
textByHashes.5620eed6e9f87fddd205f283ef05c0508c015147: Do you really think you can save them?
